tasks.name: Book the cheapest oceanfront 1-bedroom condo on Oahu for 4 nights under $250/night
tasks.description: Search on Oahu for a 4-night stay for 2 adults, filter to oceanfront 1-bedroom condos under $250 per night, sort by lowest price, and begin the booking for the cheapest option.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the destination search field, type "Oahu, Hawaii", and select the "Oahu" suggestion from the dropdown list.
Open the date picker, select August 10 as the check-in date and August 14 as the check-out date to create a 4-night stay.
Open the guests selector, set it to 2 adults and 0 children, and apply the guest selection.
Click the main "Search" button to load the list of available rentals.
In the filters panel on the search results page, select "Condo" as the property type and set bedrooms to "1 bedroom".
In the amenities filters, select the "Oceanfront" option and set the maximum nightly price to $250 using the price slider or price field.
Use the sort dropdown to choose the "Price: Low to High" option.
Click on the first listing in the sorted results and then click its "Book now" or "Start booking" button to begin the reservation for this cheapest qualifying condo.

tasks.name: Compare Maui and Kauai 2-bedroom homes and favorite the one with the lower cleaning fee
tasks.description: Find a highly rated 2-bedroom entire home on Maui and another on Kauai for the same dates and group size, compare their cleaning fees, and save the property with the lower cleaning fee to favorites.
steps: From the homepage, click on the destination search field, type "Maui, Hawaii", select the "Maui" suggestion, then open the date picker and set check-in to October 10 and check-out to October 15.
Open the guests selector, set it to 4 adults and 0 children, apply the selection, and click the main "Search" button.
On the Maui results page, open the filters panel, choose "Entire home" as the property type, set bedrooms to "2 bedrooms", and set the minimum rating to 4.5 stars.
Click on the first listing in the filtered results, then on the listing page scroll to the price or fee breakdown section and read the cleaning fee amount while keeping this tab open.
Use the site header’s destination search to change the destination to "Kauai, Hawaii" while keeping the same dates and guests, then run the search again.
On the Kauai results page, apply the same filters by selecting "Entire home", setting bedrooms to "2 bedrooms", and setting the minimum rating to 4.5 stars.
Click on the first listing in these filtered Kauai results, then scroll to the price or fee breakdown section and read the cleaning fee amount.
Compare the cleaning fees for the Maui and Kauai listings and decide which property has the lower cleaning fee.
Switch to the tab of the listing with the lower cleaning fee and scroll to the top of the page.
Click the "Save" or heart icon for that listing to add it to your favorites or default wishlist.

tasks.name: Set up a Big Island booking for 6 guests in an entire home with 3+ bedrooms, pool, Wi‑Fi, under $450/night
tasks.description: Search on the Big Island for a 5-night stay for 6 guests, filter to entire homes with at least 3 bedrooms, a pool, and Wi‑Fi, with nightly price under $450, then start the booking and proceed to the payment step without entering payment details.
steps: On the homepage, click the destination field, type "Big Island, Hawaii" or "Island of Hawaii", and select the appropriate suggestion.
Open the date picker and select June 1 as the check-in date and June 6 as the check-out date for a 5-night stay.
Open the guests selector, set it to 4 adults and 2 children, and apply the selection.
Click the main "Search" button to view available rentals.
In the filters panel, choose "Entire home" as the property type and set bedrooms to a minimum of "3 bedrooms".
In the amenities filters, select both "Pool" and "Wi‑Fi" and set the maximum nightly price to $450 using the price control.
Use the sort dropdown to choose "Price: Low to High", then click on the first listing that shows a nightly price of $450 or less in the results.
On the listing details page, click the "Reserve", "Book now", or equivalent button to go to the checkout or reservation page.

On the checkout page, fill in the guest information fields with first name "Test", last name "Family", email "family@example.com", and phone number "555-123-4567", then click the "Continue" or "Continue to payment" button to reach the payment details step without entering any payment information.

tasks.name: Use map view to find a rental within 0.5 miles of Waikiki Beach with free parking and save it to a Honolulu Trip wishlist
tasks.description: Search in Honolulu, use the map view to focus on the Waikiki Beach area, select a nearby rental with free parking for 2 guests on specific dates, and save it to a newly created ‘Honolulu Trip’ wishlist.
steps: From the homepage, click the destination search field, type "Honolulu, Oahu", select the "Honolulu" suggestion, then open the date picker and set check-in to March 15 and check-out to March 18.
Open the guests selector, set it to 2 adults and 0 children, apply the selection, and click the main "Search" button.
On the search results page, click the "Map" or "Map view" toggle to switch from list view to map view.
Use the map controls to zoom in and pan the map until the Waikiki Beach coastline area is centered and clearly visible.
Open the filters panel on the map view, select the amenity filter for "Free parking", and apply the filter.

On the map, click on the marker for a rental that appears closest to the Waikiki Beach shoreline (within roughly 0.5 miles) to open its mini-card, then click again to open the full listing details page.
On the listing details page, click the "Save" or heart icon and, when prompted, create a new wishlist named "Honolulu Trip" and save the listing to this new wishlist.
Open the account or profile menu, navigate to the "Wishlists" section, and click on the "Honolulu Trip" wishlist to view the saved rental.

tasks.name: Apply a promo code to a highly rated Maui stay with free cancellation 7+ days before check-in
tasks.description: Find a Maui rental for 2 adults for a 5-night September stay starting on a Friday, with rating at least 4.7 and free cancellation until at least 7 days before check-in, then start booking and apply the promo code ALOHA10 at checkout.
steps: On the homepage, click the destination field, type "Maui, Hawaii", and select the "Maui" suggestion.
Open the date picker, navigate to September, select a Friday (for example, September 5) as the check-in date, then select a check-out date 5 nights later (for example, September 10).
Open the guests selector, set it to 2 adults and 0 children, apply the selection, and click the main "Search" button.
On the search results page, open the filters panel and set the minimum rating filter to 4.7 stars.

In the same filters panel, locate the "Cancellation policy" or similar section, choose "Free cancellation", and select the option that specifies free cancellation until at least 7 days before check-in.
Apply the filters, then use the sort dropdown to choose "Rating: High to Low".
Click on the first listing in the filtered and sorted results to open the listing details page.
On the listing page, click the "Book now" or "Reserve" button to go to the checkout or booking summary page.
On the checkout page, locate the field labeled "Promo code", "Discount code", or similar, and type "ALOHA10" into that field.
Click the "Apply" button next to the promo code field to apply the ALOHA10 discount to this booking.

tasks.name: Book a 21-night discounted stay on Kauai under $3,500 with a kitchen and a split payment plan
tasks.description: Search on Kauai for a 21-night stay in January for 2 adults, filter to rentals with a kitchen and a long-stay discount, choose a property with total pre-tax price under $3,500, and on checkout select a 50% now / 50% later payment option.
steps: From the homepage, click the destination search field, type "Kauai, Hawaii", and select the "Kauai" suggestion.
Open the date picker and select January 3 as the check-in date and January 24 as the check-out date to make a 21-night stay.
Open the guests selector, set it to 2 adults and 0 children, apply the selection, and click the main "Search" button.
On the search results page, open the filters panel, check the "Kitchen" amenity option, and enable the filter for "Long stay discount", "Weekly/Monthly discount", or similar if available.
Apply the filters, then use the sort dropdown to select "Total price: Low to High" or the closest total-price sorting option.
Review the first few results and click on the first listing whose total stay price before taxes (for the full 21 nights) is shown as less than $3,500 in the price summary.
On the listing details page, click the "Book now", "Reserve", or equivalent button to move to the checkout flow.

Proceed through the guest details step by filling in required name and contact fields with any placeholder information (for example, first name "Test", last name "Guest"), then click the button to go to the payment options step.
On the payment options step, select the option labeled "Pay 50% now, 50% later" or the closest available split payment plan instead of paying the full amount upfront.

tasks.name: Find a pet-friendly Oahu rental under $200/night with outdoor space and message the host about a fenced yard
tasks.description: Search on Oahu for a weekend stay for 2 adults and 1 pet in May, filter to pet-friendly rentals with outdoor space and nightly price under $200, then open the first matching listing and send the host a specific question about whether the yard is fenced.
steps: On the homepage, click the destination field, type "Oahu, Hawaii", and select the "Oahu" suggestion.
Open the date picker and select May 9 as the check-in date and May 11 as the check-out date for a 2-night weekend stay.
Open the guests selector, set it to 2 adults, and use the pets field or toggle to indicate 1 pet is traveling, then apply the selection.
Click the main "Search" button to load the list of rentals.
On the results page, open the filters panel, set the maximum nightly price to $200, and select the amenity options for "Pet-friendly" and for "Outdoor space" or "Yard" if available.
Apply the filters and use the sort dropdown to choose "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first listing in the filtered results to open the listing details page.

On the listing page, click the "Contact host" or "Message host" button, type the message "Hello, we are traveling with one dog. Is the outdoor area fully fenced for pets?" into the message text area, and click the "Send" button to send this question to the host.

tasks.name: Create an account and build a ‘Summer 2026’ wishlist with one Maui and one Oahu rental under specific price limits
tasks.description: Sign up for an onsite account, set Hawaii as the preferred destination, then add one Maui rental under $300/night and one Oahu rental under $220/night, both rated 4.5+ stars, to a wishlist named ‘Summer 2026’.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Sign up" or "Create account" button in the header.

In the sign-up form, enter the name "Test User", email address "tester@example.com", a password such as "TestPass123!", and click the "Create account" or equivalent button to finish account creation without using any external email confirmation.
After the account is created, open the account menu and navigate to the profile or settings page, then set the preferred destination or home location field to "Hawaii" and save the changes.
Use the main search bar to set the destination to "Maui, Hawaii", select any future check-in and check-out dates, set guests to 2 adults, and click the main "Search" button.
On the Maui results page, open the filters panel, set the maximum nightly price to $300, set the minimum rating to 4.5 stars, and click on the first listing in the filtered results.
On this listing’s details page, click the "Save" or heart icon, choose the option to create a new wishlist, name the new wishlist "Summer 2026", and save the listing to this wishlist.
Return to the search bar in the header, change the destination to "Oahu, Hawaii" while keeping the same dates and guests, and click "Search".
On the Oahu results page, open the filters panel, set the maximum nightly price to $220, set the minimum rating to 4.5 stars, and click the first listing in the filtered results.
On this listing’s details page, click the "Save" or heart icon and select the existing "Summer 2026" wishlist so that this second property is added to the same wishlist.

fields.name: cancellation_free_min_days_before

entities.description: Represents a single search state including filters, sort, and list/map view mode
